action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 completed 3 epochs of frozen-encoder training with telephone augmentation, attentive+mean pooling, and weighted sampling. Dev EER improved from 3.62% to 0.87%, but no hidden-test eval was submitted, so the actual generalization improvement is unknown. The training curves for iter_7 are empty, suggesting metrics.jsonl was not written in the expected format. Analysis: Before committing to longer fine-tuning runs, I must measure the hidden-test EER for this checkpoint. I also need to fix metrics logging so future curves are populated. Decision: Submit eval immediately for checkpoints/best.pt. Simultaneously rewrite train.py to guarantee per-step metrics are flushed to logs/iter_{RAB_ITERATION}/metrics.jsonl in the exact JSON schema required by the harness.
